text: Heading to UC Berkeley EECS for my PhD!
Our work COM4D is accepted to CVPR 2026! Check out the paper.
Joined INSAIT as a Researcher in Sofia, Bulgaria.
Our work RoPECraft is accepted to NeurIPS 2025!
Our work Dual Encoder GAN Inversion is accepted to NeurIPS 2024!
Started as a Research Intern at ETH Zürich Computer Vision Lab (CVL).
Started as an Undergraduate Researcher at Bilkent University DLR.
